definition: Percentage of attempted questions answered correctly.
known_limitations: Can overstate readiness when few questions are attempted.

definition: Readiness-safe accuracy: correct answers over expected question count.
Share of expected questions with answer/result evidence.
known_limitations: If test_results stores generated unanswered rows, interpretation should be reviewed.

default_filter: completed, deduped, valid score; excludes multi-class tests by default
known_limitations: Depends on institute standardization and test-to-class mapping.

definition: Content/topic average score proxy using class_contents.
known_limitations: Do not call true TAS until content semantics are reviewed.

default_filter: requires question evidence and minimum completion

definition: Behavioral proxy combining accuracy, completion, and reasonable speed.
Progress between first and latest completed attempt.
known_limitations: First/latest attempt is not proven before/after lesson.
